hintWrongArea: Search available in business or superadmin areas

hint.title: Smart search
hint.descBusiness: Search by part of a name, email, US phone like +1 (555) 234-5678, booking or service text — substring match in any relevant field.
hint.descAdmin: Companies & users — name, email, phone (including US formats), address, city; listings & categories — text and slug.
hint.minChars: Type at least 2 characters to search

examples.bizName: part of a client’s first or last name
examples.bizUsPhone: fragment of a US number, e.g. (555) or 234
examples.adminCompany: part of a company name (Inc, LLC…)
examples.adminAddress: street or city as stored on the company
